rows.owner_action: Start lead and offer evaluation only after publish/KPI handoff opens weekly review.
rows.stop_condition: Do not evaluate lead or offer routes while post URLs or minimum KPI proof are incomplete.

rows.owner_action: Confirm weekly review, week decision gate, and non-empty data mode before route decisions.
rows.evidence_required: weekly review ready=1, weeklyDecision gate=1, emptyDataMode=0.
rows.stop_condition: Do not pick winners or change commerce order while empty data mode is true.

rows.owner_action: Complete weekly evidence checks before choosing content, asset, Luna, or affiliate direction.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if any weekly decision evidence row remains pending.

rows.owner_action: Keep Contact, keepsake, and Luna requests importable before using them as lead signals.
rows.evidence_required: lead ops action sheet has ready capture checks and lead magnet inventory issues=0.
rows.stop_condition: Do not collect raw sensitive content or use requests without explicit reply consent.

rows.owner_action: Advance to owned assets or Luna only after repeated same-guardian demand creates a ready route.
rows.evidence_required: lead-demand-gate readyRoutes >= 1 with traceable evidence and explicit consent.
rows.stop_condition: Do not create paid or priority assets from a single request, weak signal, or no consent.

rows.owner_action: Prepare only the smallest matching free asset or Luna aftercare item for proven demand.
rows.evidence_required: asset-fulfillment-gate has at least one ready demand pair or ready offer asset.
rows.stop_condition: Keep public free assets available, but do not build custom products before demand proof.

rows.owner_action: Only run low-risk offer experiments when both plan and queue have READY rows.
rows.evidence_required: offer-experiment-plan and offer-experiment-queue both have at least one READY row.
rows.stop_condition: Do not add paid CTA to Shorts or claim diagnosis, therapy, guarantee, or required purchase.

rows.owner_action: Keep five public free assets as safe lead magnets while real demand is absent.
rows.evidence_required: asset-fulfillment-gate publicFreeReady >= 5 and lead-demand-gate has no repeated route.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if public free assets are treated as proof of product demand without tracked requests.
